reason: At the assertion point WP only has bounds on j (from loop invariants and the loop-exit branch), namely 0 <= j and j <= 6. These assumptions do not entail j==6, so the generated assertion is too strong and causes the unprovable/timeout PO. Weakening the assertion to the provable fact matches the available information without changing C code.
